title: Poké Ball Recipe Remover [Cobblemon]
description: Very basic Data Pack that removes the Vanilla Cobblemon Poké Ball Recipes.
body:
This is a very basic Data Pack that only serves the purpose to remove the Vanilla Cobblemon Poké Ball Recipes; Intended for use in mods that overhaul their crafting recipes.

![a gif of a cursor going over the jei tab for pokeballs, it is clicking and no recipes show up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb70f0bbc3043b61ea500d311ce505d1d7b5e13f.gif)
